personal_profile.headline: Senior Frontend Engineer
personal_profile.summary: Frontend specialist with expertise in React and TypeScript.

bullets.text: Led the migration of the core design system to React 18 and TypeScript, improving render performance by 40%.
Architected a scalable component library using Tailwind CSS, reducing CSS bundle size by 60%.
Developed a high-performance data visualization dashboard using D3.js and React.
Optimized LCP and CLS metrics, achieving a Lighthouse score of 95+ for core pages.
Maintained legacy Spring Boot services for internal HR tooling.
Fixed bugs in a monolithic Java application using Hibernate and Oracle DB.
